library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Your uploaded documents and their study progress.

empty.title: No documents yet
empty.description: Upload an engineering PDF to generate notes, MCQs, flashcards, and a study schedule.

library.deleteConfirm: Delete the subject "{{name}}" and all of its documents, topics, notes, and schedule? This can't be undone.
library.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete that subject. Please try again.

study.selectTopic: Select a topic from the sidebar to start studying.
study.deleteTopicConfirm: Delete the topic "{{title}}" and its notes, quiz, and flashcards? This can't be undone.
study.deleteTopicFailed: Couldn't delete that topic. Please try again.

tabs.addToCalendar: Add this topic to the calendar

notes.empty: No notes yet for this topic — add your own below.
notes.reconstructError: Couldn't reconstruct formulas — a vision provider may be busy.

quiz.emptyTopic: No quiz questions yet for this topic.

flashcards.emptyTopic: No flashcards yet for this topic.
flashcards.clickToReveal: Click the card to reveal the answer.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.empty: No attachments yet. Add your own images or audio clips.
attachments.failed: Couldn't add that file. Images and audio up to 25 MB are accepted.

upload.title: Upload a PDF
upload.descExam: We'll read the PDF and propose a structure to review. Exam-prep documents generate only MCQs (with explanations) and flashcards — no notes.
upload.desc: We'll read the PDF and propose a chapter/topic structure for you to review before anything is generated.
upload.subject: Subject

progress.analysingHint: Reading the PDF outline and detecting chapters.
progress.book: {{count}}-page book — chapters are converted as you process them.
progress.readExam_one: Read {{count}} page — ready to build practice.
progress.readExam_other: Read {{count}} pages — ready to build practice.
progress.transcribingHint: Your audio is being transcribed. You can review its structure once it's ready.

review.loading: Reading your PDF and detecting structure…
review.title: Review structure
review.intro: Rename, add, or remove chapters and topics, and set each topic's priority. Toggle Process on the chapters you want to generate now — the rest stay paused and cost nothing until you resume them. Nothing is generated until you confirm.
review.needsManual: We couldn't detect a structure automatically. Add chapters and topics below to build one.
review.noHeadings: This PDF has no detected headings, so notes are scoped to each topic by its position in the document. Keep topics in the order they appear, and split long sections into separate topics for the most relevant notes.
review.examDateHint: Setting an exam date pulls reviews forward so nothing lands after it.
review.estimate_one: ~{{count}} topic to generate · ~{{tokens}} · free tier ($0) · paid only if you enable it.
review.estimate_other: ~{{count}} topics to generate · ~{{tokens}} · free tier ($0) · paid only if you enable it.

upload.fileHint: Upload a PDF, or an audio recording (e.g. a lecture) — audio is transcribed automatically.

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.subtitle: Your saved subjects and topics, ready to jump back into.
bookmarks.emptyDesc: Tap the bookmark icon on a subject in your library or a topic in the study view to pin it here.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.aiPlanTitle: Let AI plan a subject's study schedule
calendar.help: Click a day to add an event, drag a session to reschedule, or check one off when you've studied it. Click a topic to open it.
calendar.helpDayToggle: Double-click the Day button to switch it between an hourly grid and a list.
calendar.noEvents: No sessions scheduled for this day.

dialog.title: Add to calendar
dialog.descLocked: Schedule a study session for this topic.
dialog.desc: Schedule a custom event, a topic or subject to study, or an exam deadline.
dialog.subject: Subject
dialog.deadlineHint: Sets this subject's exam date so the AI study plan works toward it.
dialog.addFailed: Couldn't add it. Please try again.
dialog.aiPlanDesc: Pick a subject and we'll spread its topics across your calendar up to the exam date, prioritising exam-critical topics and leaving a revision buffer. This replaces any previous AI plan for that subject; your own events stay put.
dialog.noTopicsSubject: This subject has no topics yet.
dialog.planned_one: Planned {{count}} study session. They're on your calendar now.
dialog.planned_other: Planned {{count}} study sessions. They're on your calendar now.
dialog.planFailed: Couldn't build a plan. Please try again.
dialog.noPlanToRemove: There was no AI plan to remove for this subject.
dialog.removePlanFailed: Couldn't remove the plan. Please try again.
dialog.deadlineEditHint: Moving or deleting this updates the subject's exam date used by the AI study plan.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.removeEventConfirm: Remove this event from the calendar?

queue.title: Processing queue
queue.subtitle: Each subject runs its own lane — pause one to hand its model to another. Study what's ready now; the rest keeps going on free tiers.
queue.resumeCooling: A provider quota is cooling — resuming around {{time}} (~{{minutes}} min).
queue.budgetPaused: A document hit its token budget and is paused to protect your quota.
queue.budgetPausedWithTokens: A document hit its token budget (~{{spent}} / {{budget}} tokens) and is paused to protect your quota.
queue.budgetRaise: Raise the per-document token budget in Settings to continue.
queue.empty: Nothing in the queue yet. Upload a document to get started.
queue.providerBadgeTitle: Active AI provider — open the processing queue

chapters.title: Chapters
chapters.description: Resume a paused chapter to start generating its topics; pause one to stop.

history.empty: No generation history yet. As topics are generated, what produced them — and every provider switch — shows up here.

exam.title: Exam Prep
exam.subtitle: Drilled practice — every PDF here becomes MCQs (with explanations) and flashcards. No notes.
exam.emptyDesc: Add a PDF to generate exam-style MCQs and flashcards, scheduled with spaced repetition.
exam.deleteConfirm: Delete the subject "{{name}}" and all of its documents, topics, and flashcards? This can't be undone.
exam.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete that subject. Please try again.

editor.mathHint: Type <0>$E=mc^2$</0> for inline math, <1>$$…$$</1> for a block.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune the providers, study rhythm, and how Noteration looks.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Stored locally; used by the provider waterfall.

providers.title: Provider waterfall
providers.description: Free providers run first. Order is automatic (cheapest-first).

gemini.label: Use Gemini
gemini.hint: Google's free tier runs first. Turn off to generate with Ollama instead.

rotation.label: Auto-rotate models
rotation.hint: When a model hits its daily request limit, switch to the next. When the shared daily token budget runs out, fall back to Ollama.

gemini.rotationOrderHint: Tried in this order; each switches on its own daily request limit.
gemini.disabledNote: Gemini is off — notes will be generated with Ollama (or Claude, if allowed).

models.flashLiteHint: Cheapest, fastest — recommended for bulk generation.
models.flashHint: More capable, uses more quota per topic.

allowPaid.label: Allow paid fallback (Claude)
allowPaid.hint: Off = never spend; free tiers only.

ollama.label: Use local Ollama
ollama.hint: Include a local $0 model in the waterfall (must be installed).
ollama.modelHint: The local model name, as shown by `ollama list`.

budget.label: Per-document token budget
budget.hint: Safety cap: a document is paused if it spends more than this many tokens. 0 = automatic (pauses only a clear runaway, ~3× the estimate).

generation.title: Note generation
generation.description: How much content the AI generates per topic.
generation.explanation: A "page" is a unit of content (~300 words). The AI aims for this many pages per topic; if a topic doesn't have enough material it generates what it can. More pages use more tokens.

language.title: Language
language.description: The interface language, and the language new AI notes, quizzes, and flashcards are written in.
language.hint: Changes the interface immediately. New AI-generated content uses this language; already-generated content is unchanged.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: The hourly Day view's visible window and slot size. Double-click the Day button in the calendar to switch it to the hourly grid.
calendar.slotHint: The gap between rows in the hourly Day view.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Changes preview instantly; Save to keep them.
